tests.evidence: Bottles reported successful import of the normalized archive without .fvs2.
An existing packaged save loaded successfully.
A connected controller worked in gameplay.
The imported laboratory bottle ran through the existing network-isolation launcher.
Direct launch succeeded using the Unix path discovered from Bottles.

tests.notes: The runner was already installed on the test host.

limitations: The verified host already had ge-proton11-1 installed.
Flatpak and Bottles bootstrap from a clean offline host are not yet implemented.
The direct Wine and native Windows recovery profiles remain unverified.
The public fixture omits private save identity values.
